testcase.name: Verify user is able to register and login successfully
testcase.system-out: Given User launches Parabank application....................................passed When User clicks on Register link...........................................passed And User enters all registration details....................................passed And User clicks on Register button..........................................passed Then User account should get created successfully...........................passed When User logs out from application.........................................passed And User enters valid login credentials.....................................passed Then User should login successfully.........................................passed And User prints account balance.............................................passed
